qas.q: Closed accounts may be reinstated as a _____________ account
It is not permitted to make unauthorized charges to "use up" a credit
Reduced payment plan is a written agreement b/t cardholder and bank. It provides an alt to Salary Offset
Standard Travel Cards must be deactivated when not in a travel status
When the account is late between day 60 and 120, unless full payment is made on the account, it will be closed and unusable.

The Travel Card Program improves DON cash management at all levels while enhancing individual unit readiness by using a widely accepted commercial bank issued charge card.
Which statement is NOT true regarding Mission Critical status?
qas.a: Mission Critical status period cannot exceed 180 days

If bank statement includes a questionable charge, the Cardholder should attempt to resolve the issue by contacting the _______________ first.
If you receive an email or phone call requesting information about your Travel Card, you may provide the card number, but should not provide your Social Security Number.
If your card is lost or stolen, immediately contact the Citibank System Support Help Desk and your APC.
When you receive your Travel Card, you should:

Do Not Strand is a policy that allows Citi's customer service to temporarily activate an account that has been deactivated or suspended in order to ensure return travel to the traveler's duty station.
Which statement is NOT true regarding your Travel Card payment?
Cardholders should endeavor to charge expenses rather than use a cash advance, whenever feasible.
Cardholders are required to keep their personal information updated in the Defense Travel System (DTS) and the Bank's system

The SOU is an agreement between you and the Government. You are liable for the terms in the SOU; it must be updated every three years. If it is not updated every three years, you are relieved from the responsibilities outlined in the agreement even if you are still using your card.
If the arrangements are not made to pay the full balance by day ____, the account will be placed in Salary Offset.

Proper Utilization of Split Disbursement:
It is okay to leave your card as a security deposit as long as you don't share your PIN.
Cardholders should make a prompt and FULL payment of their account only after they receive reimbursement
